content.full_text:
T-83-/92
TELEPHONE ADVICE

Attorney: Leidich

Date: 6/7/83

Advice Letter: ___________________________________

Person Requesting Advice

William Hopkins

___________________________________

___________________________________

___________________________________

Telephone: (714) 998-5769

Question: §2013(c) Major Donor
(Councilmember has questions re: individual
can become a councilmember if he gives $5,000 or more
to a candidate even if he/she is from our state?

Below is SCO letter for Hopkins
after ask for Bob Franks


Advice: Out of state contributor can contribute $5000 + in calendar
year to Cand. receives committee license under federal
FEC- has jurisdiction has under problem is out of State
attendee raising jurisdiction depending judgment.

6, '83

Judy:

Please call Bill Hopkins,
Anaheim City Attorney, regarding
enforcement jurisdiction in
connection with person from out
of state who violates PRA --
specifically, an individual who
qualifies as a major donor but
refuses to file disclosure
statements.  (This is a hypothet
ical question which he was asked
a city councilmember.)

If Mr. Hopkins is not avail
able, please ask to speak to
Bob Franks.

Phone:  (714) 999-5169

Thanks.

Jeanne

For computer
From J. Davis

sections.question:
82013(c) Major Donor
Councilmember has questions - can individual become a committee if he gives $5,000 or more to a candidate even if he's from out of state?

Before TiSSO ask for Hopkins afterward, ask for Bob Franks.

Advice:
Out of state contributor who contributes $5000+ in calendar year to Calif candidates/committees becomes major donor. FSC has jurisdiction but unusual problems re out of state defendant: exerting jurisdiction, executing on judgment.

Judy:

Please call Bill Hopkins, Anaheim City Attorney, regarding enforcement jurisdiction in connection with person from out of state who violates PRA -- specifically, an individual who qualifies as a major donor but refuses to file disclosure statements. (This is a hypothetical question which he was asked a city councilmember.)

If Mr. Hopkins is not available, please ask to speak to Bob Franks.

Phone: (714) 999-5169

Thanks.

Jeanne
